title: Project Telos Twentieth-Wave Social And Blog Outreach Claims

claims.text: The twentieth-wave packet focuses only on YouTube, Reddit, and social/blog surfaces, leaving funding and GitHub out of scope for the active wave.
claims.falsification: The packet prioritizes funding or new GitHub outreach.

claims.text: The packet includes exact, non-identical comment drafts for Reddit, YouTube, and blog/social targets with URLs and reasons.
claims.falsification: The packet lacks exact text, destinations, or target reasons.

claims.text: The packet requires exact confirmation before public posting and explicitly says not to claim posting until the public side effect completes.
claims.falsification: The packet claims comments were posted or authorizes posting without exact confirmation.

claims.text: The recommended first run contains eight comments across Reddit, YouTube, and blog surfaces and avoids link-heavy/link-spraying behavior.
claims.falsification: The first run is missing, exceeds the stated batch, or includes repeated link-heavy comments.
